problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
mechanism: Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus
hypothesis: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Deep. Deep brain stimulation of subthalamic nucleus directly addresses this.
